# Maina

> Maina is a verification-first developer OS. CLI + MCP server + skills package that proves AI-generated code is correct before it merges.

## What Maina Does

Maina verifies AI-generated code with a 16-tool pipeline before it merges. It supports TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, C#, and Java. It runs inside Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP-compatible host.

## Install

```
bun add -g @mainahq/cli
maina init --install
```

## Key Features

- 16-tool verification pipeline (Biome, Semgrep, Trivy, Secretlint, SonarQube, Stryker, diff-cover, AI review, slop detection, visual regression, ruff, go vet, clippy, dotnet format, Checkstyle)
- 6 languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, C#, Java/Kotlin
- 25 CLI commands across Brainstorm, Define, Build, Verify, and Meta phases
- 8 MCP tools for IDE integration
- 5 cross-platform skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI
- Visual regression testing with Playwright
- RL feedback loop with A/B-tested prompt evolution
- Workflow context forwarding between lifecycle steps
- Structured AI delegation protocol for host agents
- Zero config — auto-detects stack and tools

## Commands

### Brainstorm
- maina brainstorm — Interactive idea exploration, generates structured GitHub issues

### Define
- maina init — Bootstrap Maina in any repo
- maina configure — Update project settings interactively
- maina ticket — Create GitHub Issue with module tagging
- maina context — Generate focused codebase context
- maina explain — Mermaid dependency diagrams
- maina design — Architecture Decision Records with HLD/LLD
- maina review-design — Review ADR against constitution

### Build
- maina plan — Create feature branch with structured spec/plan
- maina spec — Generate TDD test stubs
- maina commit — Verify with 16 tools + commit

### Verify
- maina verify — Full verification pipeline
- maina verify --deep — Add AI semantic review
- maina verify --visual — Add Playwright visual regression
- maina slop — Standalone slop pattern detection
- maina review — Two-stage code review
- maina analyze — Cross-artifact consistency check
- maina pr — Create PR with verification proof

### Meta
- maina learn — Analyze feedback, evolve prompts via A/B testing
- maina visual update — Capture visual baselines
- maina stats — Verification metrics and trends
- maina doctor — Tool health check
- maina benchmark — Run verification benchmarks

## MCP Server

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "maina": { "command": "maina", "args": ["--mcp"] } } }
```

Tools: getContext, getConventions, verify, checkSlop, reviewCode, explainModule, suggestTests, analyzeFeature

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mainahq/cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/mainahq/maina
- Docs: https://mainahq.com/

## Comparison

| Tool | Generates | Verifies | Learns | Multi-language |
|------|-----------|----------|--------|---------------|
| Copilot | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| CodeRabbit | No | Reviews | No | Yes |
| Semgrep | No | Scans | No | Yes |
| Maina | No | 16 tools + AI | Yes (RL) | 6 languages |
